title: 5.040 internal error on partially assigned circular array

features.name: unpacked array circular combinational logic
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array used in circular combinational logic where array elements are assigned based on values from other array elements in a loop

features.name: unpacked array bit-slice assignment in genfor
features.description: Code should include bit-slice assignments to unpacked array elements within nested generate for loops with localparam dimensions

features.name: dynamic unpacked array dimension with value >= 3
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with a dynamic (localparam-based) unpacked dimension where the size is at least 3

features.name: nested genfor loops with localparam
features.description: Code should include nested generate for loops where inner loop uses localparam variables computed from outer loop variable

features.name: partially assigned unpacked array across iterations
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array where only certain indices are assigned in each iteration of a loop, creating partial assignments across iterations
